HGSS.044.0000:
Welcome to the Pokémon Communication
Club Colosseum.\f
You may battle with your friends
here.\f
HGSS.044.0001:
Which Battle Mode would you like
to play? [0200,0000]
HGSS.044.0006:
There are five Battle Modes.\f
Single Battle is for two Trainers
with one or more Pokémon each.\f
Each Trainer can have one Pokémon
in battle at a time.\f
Double Battle is for two Trainers
with two or more Pokémon each.\f
Each Trainer will send out two
Pokémon to battle at a time.\f
Mix Battle is for two Trainers
with three Pokémon each.\f
Each Trainer chooses one of the
opponent’s Pokémon, mixes them\r
with their own party, and then\r
battles the other Trainer.\f
Flat Battle is for Pokémon over Lv. 50.\f
All Pokémon will become Lv. 50 for
the battle.\f
Multi Battle is for four Trainers
with one or more Pokémon each.\f
Each Trainer can have one Pokémon
in battle at a time.\f
HGSS.044.0010:
For a Double Battle, you must
have at least two Pokémon.
HGSS.044.0025:
You need a special Pokémon to enter the
GS Cup.\f
[0103,0000,0000], out of the Pokémon
you’ve found...\f
HGSS.044.0027: can be entered in the competition.\f
HGSS.044.0036:
Please decide which of you two
will become the leader.\f
The other player must then choose
“JOIN GROUP.”[0200,0000]
HGSS.044.0057:
Please decide which of you four
will become the group leader.\f
The other players must then choose
“JOIN GROUP.”[0200,0000]
HGSS.044.0066:
The members have gathered.
Please enter the room.
HGSS.044.0071:
Welcome to the Pokémon Wireless
Club Union Room.\f
You may interact directly with
many Trainers here.\f
Would you like to enter the room?
HGSS.044.0072:
The Trainers in the Union Room
will be those players around you\r
who have also entered the room.\f
You may enter two Pokémon up to
Lv. 30 for a one-on-one battle.\f
Or, you may trade your Pokémon here
with another Trainer.\f
You may also mix records or draw
with other players.\f
You may also chat with other
players in the room.\f
...Or find friends by touching
the spoken words.\f
Would you like to enter the room? [0200,0000]
HGSS.044.0077:
I hope you enjoy your time in
the Union Room.\f
HGSS.044.0120:
Which set of rules would you like
to use? [0200,0000]
HGSS.044.0122:
You need at least [0132,0001,0000] Pokémon
that qualify under the\r
[011A,0000,0000] Cup rules.
HGSS.044.0136:
It’s impossible to form a team of
Pokémon that qualify under the\r
[011A,0000,0000] Cup rules with a\r
total level limit of [0134,0001,0000].
HGSS.044.0139:
DS Wireless Communications will be
launched. [0200,0000]
HGSS.044.0140:
For a Multi Battle, you must have
at least three Pokémon.
HGSS.044.0141:
For a Mix Battle, you must have
at least three Pokémon.
HGSS.044.0142:
You have at least one Pokémon
that can’t be taken.
HGSS.044.0144:
Pardon us for the inconvenience...
Please return once you have stopped\r
being a member of Team Rocket...
HGSS.044.0145:
You cannot have more than two
legendary Pokémon in the GS Cup.
HGSS.044.0146:
Pardon us for the inconvenience...
but people wearing black clothing,\r
people who engage in unlawful\r
activities, and people who are\r
members of Team Rocket\r
are barred from participating.
HGSS.044.0147:
Pardon us for the inconvenience.\f
We have received word from Professor
Elm in New Bark Town that a PICHU\f
with spiky ears cannot be allowed
to enter.\f
Please place it in your PC Box and
enter again.
HGSS.044.0149:
Hello! Here I’ll explain to you about
the Trainer Card.\f
Your Trainer Card, with your Pokémon of
course, is proof of your status as a\r
Pokémon Trainer while you’re out\r
adventuring.\f
It keeps automatic records of all kinds
of information.\f
If you touch the card, you can view the
reverse side.\f
You can sign the back of your card.\f
You can show off your signature to
anyone you meet in the Union Room!\f
But your signature will be erased if you
decide to sign your card again, so\r
be careful!
HGSS.044.0172:
Pardon us for the inconvenience.\f
The Spiky-eared Pokémon you are
traveling with...\r
It’s a kind that doesn’t appear in the\r
Pokémon Center’s database, so we\r
unfortunately cannot allow it to pass.\f
Please place it in a PC Box and
come back.
